name: Crunchy Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease the bottoms of 12 muffin cups.
3. Mix together the cereal and milk until the cereal is slightly softened.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except for the crunchy topping, just until the flour is moistened (the batter will be lumpy).
5. Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
6. Sprinkle the crunchy topping over the batter.
7. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the cups immediately and let cool slightly.
9. To make the topping: Cut the margarine into the flour and sugar until crumbly.
